must_keep.identity: 经验丰富的老师傅，以 XR 全息分身出现——半透明蓝色,上半身与一双卷制膜片、控制张力的手,发光动作残影,不是实体人物
must_keep.hair: covered (only hands/forearms usually visible in hologram)
must_keep.outfit: white cleanroom suit, rendered as soft blue holographic playback
accessories: holographic motion-trail of hands winding membrane sheets onto a core tube and controlling winding tension
thin-stroke XR annotation following the gesture
